purpose: Generated-output proof for Wave70 mf70_under_eye mask routing using the active MOD-17 Canny v3 portrait as source.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: extremely subtle photoreal under-eye skin texture preservation pass, preserve exact person identity, gaze direction, eye shape, lower eyelid edge, natural under-eye skin texture, iris color, pupil size, sclera tone, catchlights, eyelashes, eyebrows, nose bridge, cheeks, nearby hair occlusion, face lighting, white blazer, background, and portrait composition unchanged
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: identity change, different person, gaze change, mismatched eyes, crossed eyes, asymmetrical eyes, heavy bags, swollen under eyes, dark circles, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed skin, lower eyelid deformation, eyelash mutation, eyebrow change, iris color change, glassy eyes, sclera discoloration, catchlight change, nose bridge change, cheek shape change, skin tone change, visible seam, hair mutation, clothing change, background change, watermark, text

qa_focus: under-eye skin remains natural and not over-smoothed
no dark-circle, swollen-eye, or lower-lid deformation
gaze, pupil, iris, sclera, and catchlights remain stable
cheeks and nose bridge do not mutate
no visible seam around under-eye masks

source_qa_driver.change_summary: Use the Wave70 under-eye skin mask with low denoise to prove local generated-output routing while minimizing lower-lid, gaze, cheek, nose, skin-tone, and identity drift.
